news.summary: A seasoned industry professional, Gary Kunesh has been appointed as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer by Hospitality Ventures Management Group in Atlanta.
news.headline: Hospitality Ventures Management Group appoints Gary Kunesh as Senior VP and CFO.

news.summary: Trinity Investments has recently announced the appointment of Rob Tanenbaum as the new Managing Director of Strategic Operations. This promotion signifies Tanenbaum's elevated role within the company. Based in Miami and Los Angeles, Trinity Investments is a key player in the industry. This strategic move aims to enhance operational efficiency and drive growth for the company. Tanenbaum's expertise and leadership skills make him a valuable asset in this new role. His responsibilities will include overseeing key operational aspects of the business. This announcement underscores Trinity Investments' commitment to strengthening its leadership team amidst its expansion plans.
news.headline: Trinity Investments elevates Rob Tanenbaum to Managing Director of Strategic Operations in Miami and Los Angeles.

news.summary: In Denver, Render Networks, known for network deployment management software, has been chosen by HyperFiber, a fast-growing fiber broadband provider, to automate and expand its network deployments in new markets such as Florida and Colorado. By utilizing Render's platform, HyperFiber aims to meet its ambitious growth goals by enhancing efficiency, scalability, and overall deployment quality. Seeking to streamline contractor management as it expands nationwide, HyperFiber is looking to Render for solutions.
news.headline: Render Networks chosen by HyperFiber for fiber deployment in Florida and Colorado; aims to streamline operations for growth.

news.summary: The 26th JEONJU International Film Festival is currently being held in Jeonju, South Korea, from April 30 to May 9. This event showcases a total of 224 independent and art house films originating from 57 different countries.
news.headline: 26th JEONJU Int'l Film Festival to showcase 224 indie/art house films from 57 countries in South Korea, April 30-May 9.

news.summary: ServiceNow has been recognized as a Leader in the IDC MarketScape report for Cloud-Enabled Facility Management Applications. The company, headquartered in Santa Clara, California, received this accolade for its innovative and robust offerings in this sector. ServiceNow's leadership in the industry is further solidified by its impressive numbers, including a high market share and strong growth prospects. This recognition highlights ServiceNow's commitment to providing top-notch solutions and services in the field of cloud-enabled facility management applications.
news.headline: ServiceNow recognized as a Leader in IDC MarketScape report for Cloud-Enabled Facility Management Applications.

news.summary: In Greenwich, Connecticut, QXO Inc. (NYSE: QXO) has named Val Liborski as the new Chief Technology Officer, starting on April 21, 2025. Liborski, a seasoned global tech executive, previously held the CTO role at Yahoo and HelloFresh. Before that, he managed engineering and product teams at Amazon Web Services and played a key role in tech operations for Amazon in Europe. This appointment signifies a significant move for QXO Inc. as they aim to leverage Liborski's extensive experience in the tech industry.
news.headline: QXO appoints Val Liborski as CTO, effective April 21, 2025. Liborski held CTO roles at Yahoo and HelloFresh.

news.summary: Based in Fort Lee, New Jersey, TPG Consulting, a prominent boutique consulting firm, has recently launched a new brand to demonstrate its dedication to clients within the constantly changing business environment.
news.headline: TPG Consulting rebrands to stay relevant, showcasing dedication to clients amidst changes in business environment.

news.summary: In Costa Mesa, California, MeridianLink, Inc. revealed that Essex Mortgage has effectively integrated MeridianLink® Mortgage into its operations.
news.headline: MeridianLink streamlines loan processing for Essex Mortgage, improving efficiency. $MLNK #digitallending.

news.summary: Ring Container Technologies, a prominent player in plastic container manufacturing based in Memphis, Tennessee, unveiled its fourth sustainability report titled “Pursuit of Excellence 2024”. This annual report focuses on the company's commitment to environmental, social, and governance excellence. It details accomplishments in energy efficiency, employee well-being, safety measures, and community involvement. The report emphasizes the ongoing initiatives to reduce waste effectively.
news.headline: Ring Container Technologies releases fourth annual sustainability report highlighting environmental, social, governance achievements.

news.summary: An innovative wealth advisory and financial planning firm, Bleakley Financial Group ("Bleakley"), revealed its national growth by welcoming two high-performing advisory teams from Northwestern Mutual. These teams collectively manage over $1 billion in client assets, signifying a notable achievement in expanding their presence in vital markets like Virginia, Florida, and Idaho. This development highlights Bleakley's increasing momentum in the industry.
news.headline: Bleakley Financial Group grows nationally with two new teams from Northwestern Mutual, bringing over $1 billion in assets.

news.summary: In New York, a recent announcement revealed that Savvy Wealth Inc. has appointed Lisandra Wilmott as their inaugural head of legal and compliance. This strategic move aims to enhance compliance efforts and expand legal processes within the company. Wilmott will play a crucial role in spearheading compliance projects and developing legal frameworks. This significant development showcases the company's commitment to ensuring adherence to regulations and optimizing operational efficiency.
news.headline: Savvy Wealth Inc. appoints Lisandra Wilmott as first head of legal & compliance, focusing on compliance and legal workflows.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, GReminders, a platform specializing in meeting and automation management for advisors, revealed new integrations with leading CRM providers catered to the industry.
news.headline: GReminders partners with top CRMs to enhance advisor workflows. Streamlining processes for efficient management.

news.summary: The acquisition of Schenker is anticipated to be finalized, and the Q1 2025 interim results of DSV A/S are set to be disclosed on April 30, 2025. A conference call has been arranged for 11:30 am CEST on the same day.
news.headline: DSV to complete Schenker acquisition by Q1 2025, analyst call at 11:30 am CEST on 30 April 2025.

news.summary: Great Clips, the Official Hair Salon of the NHL and NHLPA, has rolled out its 2025 Stanley Cup® Playoffs sweepstakes, offering fans a unique chance to secure a trip and tickets to a 2025 Stanley Cup Final game using the Great Clips app. The "Check-In to Win Sweepstakes" runs until May 19, where fans can participate by downloading and checking in through the Great Clips app. A single fortunate fan and a companion will receive tickets to a Stanley Cup Final game. Don't miss your shot at this exciting opportunity!
news.headline: Great Clips launches 2025 Stanley Cup Playoffs sweepstakes. Fans can enter by checking in on the app before May 19 for chance to win trip & tickets to the final game.

news.summary: In a recent update, Southern Glazer’s revealed the appointment of Greg Astle as the new Executive Vice President and General Manager for the Florida region. The promotion, effective immediately, signifies Astle's elevated role within the company.
news.headline: Southern Glazer's promotes Greg Astle to Executive VP, General Manager, Florida. Effective immediately.

news.summary: Dine Brands Global, Inc., the company behind popular restaurant chains Applebee's Neighborhood Grill & Bar, IHOP, and Fuzzy’s Taco Shop, will be releasing its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on May 7, 2025. The announcement will be made before the stock market opens. Additionally, a conference call will be held at 9:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day to discuss the financial results and business outlook of the company. A live webcast of the call will also be available for those interested. Dine Brands is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol DIN.
news.headline: Dine Brands Global, Inc. will reveal Q1 2025 earnings on May 7th, 2025 for Applebee's, IHOP, and Fuzzy's Taco.

news.summary: In BROOMFIELD, Colo. & AUSTIN, Texas, Recurly, a prominent subscription management company, has launched its most revolutionary product update yet. Revealed during its virtual event, Subscription Sessions, the company introduced Recurly Compass, an advanced AI-driven growth engine. Additionally, they unveiled a Shopify integration catering to ecommerce subscriptions at an enterprise level. To enhance global expansion, new plug-and-play payment features were also introduced to simplify operations.
news.headline: Recurly launches new product suite at Subscription Sessions event with AI growth engine, Shopify integration, and plug-and-play payments.

news.summary: Pixis, an AI-driven advertising solution aiding brands in enhancing ad effectiveness and optimizing processes, revealed a new brand identity today in New York. This update symbolizes the company's growth and future goals, cementing its role as a key ally for marketers in the AI-focused advertising landscape. Having managed over $1 billion in ad expenditure through its platform in the past year, this rebrand marks a significant turning point for Pixis in solidifying its position in the industry.
news.headline: Pixis rebrands to solidify AI-led ad leadership, processing $1 billion in ad spend within a year.

news.summary: In Miami, ReturnPro (formerly goTRG), a leading company in returns management and reverse logistics, released a consumer research report titled “The State of Consumer Returns,” emphasizing the importance of returns in the evolving retail environment. The report is based on a survey of 500 U.S. consumers from various demographics. It highlights that consumer returns are not just a standard business expense anymore; they significantly influence shopper behavior.
news.headline: ReturnPro releases report on consumer returns, based on survey of 500 US consumers, highlighting importance in retail.

news.summary: A popular brand from Vermont has recently introduced three of its top-selling supplements at specific Target stores. New Chapter®, a well-known company specializing in science-backed and whole food-based vitamins and supplements, made this move on April 16, 2025. The brand is recognized for its high-quality products and dedication to providing effective health solutions.
news.headline: New Chapter launches 3 supplements at Target, expanding retail presence. Known for science-backed, whole food-based products.

news.summary: Rheem®, a prominent global HVACR and water heating products manufacturer, recently unveiled new models in the 3-5 ton range in Atlanta on April 16, 2025. These latest models come equipped with two stages of cooling, promising improved efficiency levels. This launch marks an expansion in Rheem's commercial product line, catering to the need for higher efficiency solutions in the HVACR sector.
news.headline: Rheem® introduces new higher efficiency 3-5 ton models with two stages of cooling in commercial product line expansion.

news.summary: Today, Pacify, a top player in doula-led maternal health solutions based in Arlington, Va., has collaborated with Seven Starling, a specialized provider of women's mental health care. The partnership aims to offer a complete range of maternal health benefits to their members. This partnership comes as a significant move in the health industry, with both companies bringing their unique expertise together. The collaboration is expected to impact a large number of individuals, with the potential to change the landscape of maternal health services.
news.headline: Pacify partners with Seven Starling to offer comprehensive maternal health benefits, combining doula-led solutions with mental health care.

news.summary: A report on the Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicles Market projects significant growth from 2024 to 2033. The market is predicted to increase from US$102.26 billion in 2024 to US$258.22 billion by 2033, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 10.84% during the forecast period. Key factors fueling this growth include increasing internet penetration, digitization, and technological advancements. The report offers a detailed analysis based on vehicle class, car type, country, and company, providing valuable insights for the industry stakeholders.
news.headline: Global plug-in hybrid electric vehicles market to reach $258.22 billion by 2033, with a CAGR of 10.84% from 2025-2033. Driving factors include affordability, performance, and sustainability.

news.summary: Planview, a company based in Austin, Texas, recently revealed the recipients of its 14th annual Vision Awards. These awards aim to acknowledge industry frontrunners who are making use of Planview solutions effectively.
news.headline: Planview announces winners of 14th annual Vision Awards, highlighting industry leaders who use their solutions.

news.summary: Brother's Bond Bourbon, an award-winning whiskey from PLANO, is making a difference by promoting soil health. On April 16, 2025, they launched the "SHAKE & STIR UP CHANGE" campaign to encourage bourbon enthusiasts to drink sustainably and contribute to the cause. This initiative aims to raise awareness about the importance of supporting soil health. The campaign highlights the significance of every sip by emphasizing sustainability in the bourbon industry. Brother's Bond Bourbon is leading the way by showcasing how individuals can make a positive impact through their choices.
news.headline: Brother's Bond Bourbon promotes regenerative agriculture, supporting soil health, with campaign encouraging sustainable sipping.

news.summary: Optiv + ClearShark, a cybersecurity and IT solutions company specializing in serving the U.S. federal government, has introduced FedRAMP Advisory Services on April 16, 2025. This service aims to assist organizations in enhancing their strategy, planning, and readiness in cybersecurity.
news.headline: Optiv + ClearShark launch FedRAMP Advisory Services aimed at helping cloud providers work with U.S. government by offering strategy, planning, and readiness support.

news.summary: In a recent development, Organic Valley, the leading organic dairy cooperative, revealed the promotion of two women to its executive leadership team. This strategic move emphasizes the organization's commitment to diversity and empowerment. The company appointed these accomplished individuals to key positions, signaling a shift towards a more inclusive workplace culture. Additionally, Organic Valley introduced a new role focused on transformation within the company. This initiative aims to drive innovation and adaptability in response to the rapidly changing market dynamics. Such proactive steps are crucial for businesses to stay competitive and relevant in the industry. This announcement demonstrates Organic Valley's dedication to progress and advancement, setting a positive example for the sector.
news.headline: Organic Valley promotes 2 women to executive roles, introduces new transformation role, embracing coop principles.

news.summary: A recent study by PetSmart Charities and Gallup revealed that 52% of pet owners in the U.S. have chosen to forego essential veterinary care for their pets. Among them, 71% cited financial concerns as the main reason for skipping or declining this care. The findings highlight the significant impact of financial considerations on pet healthcare decisions, emphasizing the challenges many pet parents face in meeting their pets' medical needs.
news.headline: 52% of U.S. pet parents skip or decline needed vet care; 71% due to financial reasons /PRNewswire/ - April 16, 2025.

news.summary: In Philadelphia, during Spring Car Care Month, SimpleTire, an online tire retailer based in Philadelphia and part of the Dealer Tire Family of Companies, has been recognized for the third consecutive year on Newsweek’s 2025 list of America’s Best Online Shops. They have secured a position in the Top 10 retailers in the Sport, Outdoor, & Motor Sector’s “Car, Motorcycle, & Boat” category for two years in a row. This achievement highlights SimpleTire's success and commitment to excellence in the online retail sector.
news.headline: SimpleTire celebrates Car Care Month as 3-year Newsweek Best Online Shops Champion, part of Top 10 in Sport, Outdoor, & Motor Sector.

news.summary: Child exploitation online has seen a significant increase, with online grooming crimes against children rising by 82% in the last five years, as reported by NSPCC in 2023. It is estimated that more than 500,000 predators are active online daily, using social media to target vulnerable individuals. In light of these alarming statistics, Child Rescue Coalition (CRC) is initiating a crucial campaign during National Child Abuse Prevention Month titled “Watch What You Post. They Are,” emphasizing the urgency of the situation. This campaign aims to raise awareness and prevent further exploitation of children online.
news.headline: Child Rescue Coalition warns of dangers of 'sharenting'. Online child exploitation has surged by 82% in past 5 years, with over 500,000 predators online daily. Launching campaign urging caution in posting online.

news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky, the Humana Foundation, the charitable arm of Humana Inc. for over four decades, unveiled its latest report titled Strengthening Science and Community Impact Through Equitable Research Practices. This report delves into the pioneering research techniques employed by the Foundation's collaborators to advance health equity in public health studies via community-engaged research methods. The report provides crucial insights and recommendations to support funding for these initiatives.
news.headline: Humana Foundation's new report highlights innovative community-engaged research practices in promoting health equity.

news.summary: In Jericho, New York, 1-800-FLOWERS.COM, Inc. (NASDAQ: FLWS), a prominent gift provider focused on fostering stronger connections, revealed plans to unveil its financial report for the fiscal 2025 third quarter on May 8, 2025. The press release is scheduled to be publicized post-market closure, followed by a conference call featuring senior management at 4:30 p.m. (ET).
news.headline: 1-800-FLOWERS.COM to release Q3 results on May 8, 2025. Conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET. (NASDAQ: FLWS)

news.summary: Reynolds Consumer Products Inc. (Nasdaq: REYN) based in Lake Forest, Illinois, will be revealing its first quarter financial results on Wednesday, April 30, 2025. Scott Huckins, the Company’s President and Chief Executive Officer, and Nathan Lowe, the Chief Financial Officer, will be leading a live webcast at 7:00 a.m. CT (8:00 a.m. ET) on the same day to discuss the outcomes. For those interested, a link to the webcast and all pertinent earnings materials will be accessible at https://investors.reynoldsconsu.
news.headline: Reynolds Consumer Products Inc. (Nasdaq: REYN) to report Q1 financial results on April 30, 2025 at 7:00 am CT. CEO and CFO to host webcast.

news.summary: A technology company, Empathy, has partnered with Voya Financial to introduce Empathy LifeVault™ to its clients, making Voya the first financial institution to offer this service. Empathy's platform aims to revolutionize planning for life's challenges, providing policyholders, employees, and beneficiaries with a comprehensive tool for future preparation. The collaboration comes after Empathy's annual research report, The Grief Tax, highlighted the financial burdens associated with loss.
news.headline: Empathy partners with Voya Financial to offer LifeVault™ to clients, first financial institution to do so.

news.summary: In Miami, Spearmint Energy, a cutting-edge energy company focused on providing reliable and affordable energy solutions to the power grid through large-scale battery storage, has recently secured over $250 million in funding. The company has commenced construction on two Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) named Tierra Seca and Seven Flags, each with a capacity of 100 MW / 200 MWh. These systems are situated in Del Rio and Laredo, Texas, operating within the ERCOT power market. The successful financing has allowed Spearmint Energy to move forward with these impactful projects.
news.headline: Spearmint Energy secures $250 million for 400 MWh battery storage, constructing two 100 MW / 200 MWh BESS projects in ERCOT.

news.summary: Veolia North America has recently revealed an extended partnership with MassBio, a renowned consortium of biopharmaceutical research and development firms. The multi-year contract extension highlights their commitment to delivering advanced waste management services and digital energy efficiency management to members. Headquartered in Cambridge, Mass., MassBio is recognized as a leading player in the industry. This collaboration signifies a significant milestone, underscoring the commitment to innovation and sustainability in the sector.
news.headline: Veolia and MassBio extend partnership to provide sustainable solutions to Massachusetts life sciences industry.
AMD expects export control may result in charges up to $800m, the US export control applies to company’s MI308 products.

news.summary: Crowne Plaza by IHG, a top-tier hotel brand globally, has introduced innovative offerings and guest experiences aimed at promoting meaningful connections among business travelers. The unveiling of these new initiatives took place in Atlanta on April 16, 2025. As a pioneer in the blended travel sector, Crowne Plaza is enhancing its services to emphasize the importance of intentional togetherness. This strategic move is expected to cater to the needs of modern business travelers who prioritize quality interactions during their stay.
news.headline: Crowne Plaza launches "Bring Your Bestie" promotion for work and play, encouraging togetherness - April 16, 2025.

news.summary: Cohere Health, a prominent provider of clinical intelligence solutions for health plans, has recently welcomed Dr. Paul to their Medical Advisory Board. Dr. Paul, an accomplished spine surgeon, brings a wealth of experience that will further strengthen and expand Cohere Health's AI-powered solutions. This addition is part of Cohere Health's strategic efforts to enhance their offerings. The company's focus on utilizing advanced technology is evident, with the date of this announcement being April 16, 2025. This move signifies Cohere Health's commitment to leveraging expertise in the field, with Dr. Paul set to play a crucial role in shaping the future of clinical intelligence solutions.
news.headline: Cohere Health appoints Dr. Paul Johnson to its Medical Advisory Board to boost AI clinical intelligence solutions.

news.summary: Amsterdam, April 16, 2025 - OCI Global (Euronext: OCI) has officially announced that there will be an extraordinary cash distribution of USD 4.74 per share, totaling USD 1.0 billion, to be paid around May 7, 2025. The equivalent Euro amount for this distribution is...
news.headline: OCI Global will pay an extraordinary cash distribution of USD 4.74 per share (totaling USD 1.0 billion) on May 7, 2025. Euro equivalent details for the distribution will also be provided.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in New York, The House of Rémy Martin announced a special partnership with acclaimed artist Anish Kapoor. This collaboration showcases a limited-edition Rémy Martin XO decanter and an exclusive artwork. The collection is a one-of-a-kind project aimed at combining art and luxury.
news.headline: Rémy Martin XO collaborates with Anish Kapoor on limited edition decanter and artwork, unveiled in New York.

news.summary: A new automated incentives feature has been introduced by Wildfire Systems Inc. in their white-label rewards platform, aimed at assisting businesses in boosting engagement and revenue without requiring any technical expertise. This innovation was unveiled in San Diego on April 16, 2025. Wildfire Systems Inc. is a leading financial technology platform that specializes in enhancing loyalty and reward programs for businesses.
news.headline: Wildfire Systems introduces new incentives feature in loyalty program to boost engagement and revenue.

news.summary: In an announcement made in Atlanta on April 16, 2025, Torres, a seasoned professional with experience at top companies like Goldman Sachs, Ulu Ventures, Uber, and Google, has joined Open Opportunity Fund. This venture capital firm specializes in investing in B2B software and aims to drive operational scale and strategic growth for its portfolio companies. Torres' expertise in investment and technology will be instrumental in this endeavor, bringing valuable experience to the table. This move signifies a strategic push towards further enhancing the growth and performance of the fund's investments.
news.headline: Nancy Torres appointed as Senior VP at Open Opportunity Fund, bringing expertise from prestigious firms to drive growth.

news.summary: Pittsburgh-based Powercast Corporation, a leading provider of wireless charging solutions, has received the prestigious honor of being named a Best Place to Work in 2025 for the second consecutive year by the Business Intelligence Group. This recognition underscores Powercast's commitment to creating a positive work environment.
news.headline: Powercast, a wireless charging solutions provider, named a 2025 Best Place to Work for 2nd year by Business Intelligence Group.

news.summary: A recent study by Burford Capital reveals that approximately 80% of in-house lawyers believe their companies are not maximizing their potential value. The research specifically focuses on patent monetization as a strategy for companies to capitalize on their intellectual property. The study was conducted in New York and the findings were released on April 16, 2025. Burford Capital is a prominent global finance and asset management firm specializing in legal matters.
news.headline: Burford Capital research finds 8 in 10 in-house lawyers say companies aren't fully capitalizing on patent value.

news.summary: Sky Organics, a prominent provider of natural and certified organic personal care items, has introduced two new certified organic products aimed at nourishing curls and supporting scalp health. These products are now accessible at Walmart locations throughout the country. The company, based in Boca Raton, Florida, made the announcement on April 16, 2025.
news.headline: Sky Organics launches 2 new certified organic hair products for curls and scalp health, now at Walmart nationwide.

news.summary: Introducing a New Generation of Aromatherapy with Luxury Scents in New York. On April 16, 2025, ripple⁺ Home revealed its latest REED Diffuser collection aimed at transforming home fragrances. The brand is committed to reshaping aromatherapy and creating a luxurious ambiance.
news.headline: ripple⁺ Home launches REED, its first home Scent Diffuser collection, offering luxury scents for aromatherapy.

news.summary: Experience the revolutionary Method 360 ANC true wireless earbuds for an exclusive introductory price of just $99 in Park City, Utah. Skullcandy and Bose have joined forces to launch this groundbreaking product designed to deliver top-notch audio quality. This partnership aims to redefine personal audio by offering a premium listening experience.
news.headline: Skullcandy's new Method 360 ANC earbuds, with premium sound by Bose, available at $99 introductory price.

news.summary: The KT Soothe line, which consists of the KT Tape Soothe and KT Health Soothe Magnesium Cream, is now available. These products are infused with lavender essential oils and magnesium for pain relief and muscle recovery. Developed by KT, a leading provider of kinesiology tape and sports recovery solutions, this line aims to provide innovative solutions for athletes and individuals in need of relief. The products offer a unique blend of ingredients aimed at enhancing recovery and reducing discomfort. The line was launched on April 16, 2025, in American Fork, Utah.
news.headline: KT introduces new lavender products for recovery: KT Tape Soothe & KT Health Soothe Magnesium Cream for pain relief and muscle recovery.

news.summary: In Troy, Maine on April 16, 2025, Syncarpha Capital, a company headquartered in New York specializing in solar and storage projects, has successfully obtained Permission to Operate (PTO) from Central Maine Power (CMP) for its latest endeavor, the community solar initiative known as Troy Solar I. This milestone signifies the completion and approval of the project, furthering Syncarpha Capital’s commitment to sustainable energy solutions and marking a significant step towards boosting the region's renewable energy capacity.
news.headline: Syncarpha Capital's Troy Solar I in Maine receives Permission to Operate from CMP, marking a milestone in community solar.
